ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 6-2) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "year_of_birth" TEXT /* Year of birth of the player */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school attended by the player */,
  "draft_status" TEXT /* Draft status of the player (e.g., drafted in 2020) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference the school belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school (e.g., Gainesville, FL) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the school */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* School's mascot */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the school's basketball arena */,
  "year_established" TEXT /* Year the basketball program was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference (e.g., SEC, Big 12) */,
  "found_year" TEXT /* Year the conference was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the conference's headquarters */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the conference commissioner */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Current number of teams in the conference */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of season statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the statistics (e.g., 2007-08) */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular, postseason) */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played */,
  "field_goals" REAL /* Number of field goals made */,
  "field_goal_attempts" REAL /* Number of field goal attempts */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "two_point_field_goals" REAL /* Number of two-point field goals made */,
  "two_point_field_goal_attempts" REAL /* Number of two-point field goal attempts */,
  "two_point_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Two-point field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_field_goals" REAL /* Number of three-point field goals made */,
  "three_point_field_goal_attempts" REAL /* Number of three-point field goal attempts */,
  "three_point_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Three-point field goal percentage */,
  "free_throws" REAL /* Number of free throws made */,
  "free_throw_attempts" REAL /* Number of free throw attempts */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "total_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Personal fouls */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored */,
  "team_captain" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player was a team captain */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards received during the season */,
  "injuries" TEXT /* Details of significant injuries during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_career_stats" (
  "career_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of career statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Total number of games started */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played */,
  "field_goals" REAL /* Total field goals made */,
  "field_goal_attempts" REAL /* Total field goal attempts */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "two_point_field_goals" REAL /* Total two-point field goals made */,
  "two_point_field_goal_attempts" REAL /* Total two-point field goal attempts */,
  "two_point_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Two-point field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_field_goals" REAL /* Total three-point field goals made */,
  "three_point_field_goal_attempts" REAL /* Total three-point field goal attempts */,
  "three_point_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Three-point field goal percentage */,
  "free_throws" REAL /* Total free throws made */,
  "free_throw_attempts" REAL /* Total free throw attempts */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "total_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Total personal fouls */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "all_star_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of all-star appearances */,
  "awards_summary" TEXT /* Summary of significant awards throughout the career */,
  "highest_points_in_game" INTEGER /* Highest number of points scored in a single game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("career_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_career_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, data analyst, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
